rules.name: pleasantries
rules.pattern: (?<!make\s)(?<!be\s)\b(?:i'?d be happy to|i would be happy to|i'?d be glad to|i would be glad to|glad to help|happy to|thank you|thanks|no problem|you'?re welcome|absolutely|certainly|of course|sure)\b[,.!?\s]*

rules.name: polite_framing
rules.pattern: \b(?:please|kindly|could you please|would you please|can you please|I would like you to|I want you to|I need you to)\b\s*

rules.name: hedging
rules.pattern: \b(?:it seems like|it appears that|I think that|I believe that|probably|possibly|maybe it)\b\s*

rules.name: verbose_instructions
rules.pattern: \b(?:provide a detailed explanation of|give me a comprehensive explanation of|write an in-depth explanation of|create a thorough explanation of|provide a detailed|give me a comprehensive|write an in-depth|create a thorough|explain in detail)\b

rules.name: filler_phrases
rules.pattern: ^(?:I want to|I need to|I'd like to|I'm looking for)\b\s*

rules.name: verbose_requests
rules.pattern: \b(?:I was wondering if you could|Would it be possible to)\b\s*

rules.name: self_reference
rules.pattern: ^(?:I am trying to|I am working on|I have been)\b\s*

rules.name: excessive_gratitude
rules.pattern: \b(?:Thank you so much|Thanks in advance|I really appreciate)\b[,.!?\s]*

rules.name: softeners
rules.pattern: \b(?:if possible|when you get a chance|at your convenience|just wondering)\b[,.!?\s]*

rules.name: uncertainty_fillers
rules.pattern: \b(?:I guess|I suppose|more or less|in a way)\b\s*
